creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
This port provides a Castilian Spanish, male voice for Festival. It
depends on the festival port (ports/21182). This is based on the NetBSD
port.  Please retain the line saying so, and the $NetBSD$ RCS tags, when
committing it.

Fix: 

http://jpj.net/~trevor/freebsd/ports/festvox-el11.shar
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
